_comment: MYOH import prepared from current export plus updated Peter payment plan discussed in chat. Remove this comment key before importing if the app rejects comments.

arrearsItems.creditor: STD Family Trust / Peter — rent arrears plan
arrearsItems.summary: Household rent arrears plan only. Staged arrears reductions total $5,801.96 across the dated base schedule. Current rent remains $1,080/fortnight ($540/week).
arrearsItems.objective: Protect current rent first and clear arrears under the dated rent-first plan, while allowing short-term payment timing shifts where income is reduced.
arrearsItems.workingPlan: Payment of $430 sent on 2026-05-21 covering prior shortfall ($280) plus arrears add-on ($150). Fortnightly rent originally due 2026-05-22 is pushed to 2026-05-29 at $1,080. Overdue SA Water $201.96 is pushed to 2026-06-05. Current rent remains priority ahead of bond restoration.
arrearsItems.communicationPosition: Reduced income week due to sickness required a short staged catch-up. Landlord to be advised of $430 payment sent and revised dates.
arrearsItems.externalPaymentIntent: 2026-05-21 paid $430; 2026-05-29 pay $1,080 current rent; 2026-06-05 pay $201.96 overdue SA Water.
arrearsItems.externalStagedReduction: Current short-term sequence: $430 paid 2026-05-21, then $1,080 on 2026-05-29, then $201.96 on 2026-06-05. Earlier broader staged reduction schedule remains subject to review once income stabilises.
arrearsItems.externalReviewPoints: Review again after 2026-05-29 landlord payment and before 2026-06-05 water payment.
arrearsItems.evidenceLinks: Statement for Gary McCourt As At 17May2026.pdf; Invoice INV-0440.pdf; Final Rent Proposal To Peter - Conditional 12 Week Version.pdf

commsEntries.outcome: Advised reduced income due to sickness, confirmed $430 payment sent, and proposed shifted dates of 2026-05-29 for rent and 2026-06-05 for overdue SA Water.
commsEntries.nextStep: Send or confirm email to Peter and make 2026-05-29 rent payment.
